data.title: 国际服活动复刻「New Year's Rhapsody No. 68」
data.summary: [Event Update Notice] The New Year's Rhapsody No. 68 Event Story is returning! Ring in the New Year
data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

The New Year's Rhapsody No. 68 Event Story is returning!
Ring in the New Year in Kivotos with the members of Problem Solver 68!

🗓️Schedule: 9/26 (Tue) 1:00 PM – 10/10 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

#BlueArchive
